one_liner: ASTS -3.11% with sentiment score -0.871 — the most negative sentiment in the entire watchlist; space-based cellular network faces execution risk and the negative consensus is overwhelming.

news_catalyst.headline: AST SpaceMobile vs Boeing: satellite cellular comparison article highlights execution risk
news_catalyst.summary: ASTS faces skepticism about its direct-to-cellular satellite network timeline and capital requirements. The -0.871 sentiment score (most negative in watchlist) reflects widespread concern about SpaceMobile's execution on its BlueBird satellite constellation.
